name: libhtml-wikiconverter-wakkawiki-perl
title: libhtml-wikiconverter-wakkawiki-perl
summary: HTML to wiki markup converter - WakkaWiki dialect
description:
HTML to wiki markup converter - WakkaWiki dialect
HTML::WikiConverter is an HTML to wiki converter. It can convert HTML
source into a variety of wiki markups, called wiki "dialects".
.
HTML::WikiConverter::WakkaWiki provides the WakkaWiki dialect.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhtml-wikiconverter-wakkawiki-perl because HTML to wiki markup converter - WakkaWiki dialect.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhtml-wikiconverter-wakkawiki-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhtml-wikiconverter-wakkawiki-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhtml-wikiconverter-wakkawiki-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
